raw.subject: Your Lancaster page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the rustic feel of your photos showcasing Lancaster's countryside. It's a great way to connect with your community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new customers to find you online and schedule appointments. 

I sketched up a simple homepage idea from what you post on Facebook, featuring a services menu, work gallery, and a clear booking CTA. https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/nailcessity-lancaster

I'd love to discuss turning this into a full-fledged site with a flat fee for local businesses like yours. If you're interested, please reply or let's schedule a quick call to discuss details.
